scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ubimate/utils build && pnpm --filter admin build && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.caprover:deploy-app: cp captain-definition-unified /tmp/captain-definition && tar -czf /tmp/ubimate-app.tar.gz -C /tmp captain-definition -C $PWD Dockerfile.unified packages apps/api apps/admin pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml package.json && rm /tmp/captain-definition && caprover deploy -a ubimate-app -t /tmp/ubimate-app.tar.gz
